A.description: Event that the first toss is odd; probability P{A} = 1/2, used in checking independence.

B.description: Event that the second toss is even; probability P{B} = 1/2, used in checking independence.

C.description: Event that the total number of spots equals seven; probability P{C} = 1/6, used in checking independence.

A_intersect_B_intersect_C.description: Joint probability of events A, B, and C occurring simultaneously; P{A ∩ B ∩ C} = 1/12, compared with P{A}·P{B}·P{C} to check independence.
